# Transp. Code
## Title 4
### Chapter 64. Rates of Pilotage
##### § 64.001 — Definition

In this chapter, “consignee” includes:

    (1) the master;

    (2) the owner;

    (3) the agent;

    (4) the subagent; and

    (5) a person who enters or clears a vessel of the collector of customs.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.text: a person who enters or clears a vessel of the collector of customs.

history.raw: Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.
